behaviors.behavior: MissionBody root is a bounded flex column (flex/flex-col/min-h-0/flex-1) so each card scrolls internally, not the page
behaviors.evidence: MissionBody.test.tsx::"root is a bounded flex column so each card scrolls internally, not the page" PASSED

behaviors.behavior: The Mission artifact card scrolls internally while the shell scroller does NOT grow (real-browser geometry)
behaviors.evidence: e2e/flows/mission-viewer-scroll-popout.spec.ts -- card scrollHeight>clientHeight AND main-scroll-container scrollHeight<=clientHeight+4 PASSED (chromium, isolated stack)

behaviors.behavior: A 'Pop out' control renders on the Mission artifact panel; the modal mounts only once opened
behaviors.evidence: MissionArtifactPanel.test.tsx::"renders a Pop out control, and mounts the modal only once opened" PASSED

behaviors.behavior: Pop out opens a viewport-centered modal rendering the SAME artifact body (summary+detail), with its own scroll
behaviors.evidence: MissionArtifactPanel.test.tsx::"opens a modal that renders the SAME artifact body, and the X closes it" + e2e centering(cx/cy<8px)+modal-body scrollTop>0 PASSED

behaviors.behavior: Modal closes via close X, ESC, and backdrop click; ESC on the modal does NOT also close the panel behind it (AC4)
behaviors.evidence: MissionArtifactPanel.test.tsx::"Esc closes the modal but NOT the panel behind it (AC4)" + e2e ESC/X/backdrop-close-with-panel-visible PASSED

behaviors.behavior: The inline panel still renders each artifact kind's existing shape (document/requirement/tests/review/decisions/commit) and the stale-vs-unavailable distinction after the MissionArtifactBody extract
behaviors.evidence: covered-by-existing-test: MissionArtifactPanel.test.tsx suites (two-region layout, spec/requirement/commit detail, stale-vs-unavailable) all PASSED post-refactor
